particulars.description: All freehold and leasehold properties (whether registered or unregistered) and all commonhold properties, now or in the future (and from time to time) owned by the chargor, or in which the chargor holds an interest.

The freehold properties known as polar house, bowburn north industrial estate, bowburn,. Durham DH6 5PF and as more particularly described at the land registry as land forming part. Of polar house, bowburn north industrial estate, bowburn, durham (DH6 5PF), title number:. DU187465; land on the north side of polar house, bowburn north industrial estate, bowburn,. Durham (DH6 5PF), title number: DU187467; and land lying to the south-west of polar. House, bowburn north industrial estate, bowburn, durham (DH6 5PF), title number:. DU281785.
